## Identity

- Full name: Muhammad Ferdi Alfian
- Alias: Ferdi Alfian, ferdialf
- Location: Palembang, Indonesia
- Email: ferdialf.dev@gmail.com
- Portfolio: https://ferdialf.vercel.app

## Role

Software Engineer with 3 years of experience (2023–present).
Available for freelance projects. Delivered 28+ projects across clients.

## Education

- SMKN 4 Palembang — Software Engineering, Vocational High School (2023–2026)
- Pursuing higher education (in progress)

## Tech Stack

- Frontend: Next.js, React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, TanStack Query, Alpine.js, MUI
- Backend: Laravel, Golang, Node.js, Hono, Bun
- Database: PostgreSQL
- Other: Inertia.js, Leaflet, Midtrans, REST API

## Awards

- 1st Place — Web Design & Development, VALTER 2025, Politeknik Negeri Sriwijaya
- 1st Runner-Up — Digital Technology Innovation, South Sumatra (Dinas Pendidikan Sumatera Selatan)

## Selected Projects

- Unfold Table: Headless table component with nested data, caching, pagination (Next.js, TypeScript)
  https://github.com/ferdi-alf/unfold-table

- Smart Online Exams: Exam platform with academic integrity detection, Go backend
  https://github.com/ferdi-alf/web-ujian-nextjs

- VALTER 2025: 1st-place competition web design showcase
  https://github.com/ferdi-alf/valter-2025-co-volution | https://valter-2025-co-volution.vercel.app

- Dekatku: Geolocation MSME discovery with AI search and interactive map (React, Laravel, Leaflet)
  https://github.com/alfandy12/dekatku

- Learning Management System: LMS with roles, exams, cheat detection, badge system (Laravel)
  https://github.com/ferdi-alf/LMS-Syneps-Academy

- Decision Making System: AHP-TOPSIS multi-criteria employee evaluation (React, Laravel)
  https://github.com/ferdi-alf/spk-ahp-topsis

- Internship Presence Tracker: Geofenced attendance with interactive city map (React, TypeScript, Laravel)
  https://github.com/ferdi-alf/internship-absence

- Simple Cashier Payment: POS with Midtrans payment gateway (Next.js, TypeScript)
  https://github.com/ferdi-alf/website-kasir-paymentGateway
